description: You are auditing a bibliography for a machine learning survey. Several papers were imported incorrectly as 'Journal Article' but are actually 'Conference Paper'. Change the Item Type from 'Journal Article' to 'Conference Paper' for 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al.), 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky et al.), and 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al.). Ensure 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search' (Silver et al.) remains a 'Journal Article'. Do not change any other metadata fields.

targets.title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search
